title: luzula wahlenbergii subsp. piperi
intro: Luzula wahlenbergii subsp. piperi, also known as Piper's woodrush, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and to soothe respiratory issues. The health benefits of Luzula wahlenbergii subsp. piperi include its potential to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Piper's woodrush can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to address colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments.
